title: Argus Partners advises Spinny on raising $340 million across fundraises
description: Valuedrive Technologies Private Limited, dba Spinny, has raised approximately $340 million across its Series F and its Series G fundraises.The Series F round was led by Accel Leaders Fund and WestBridge, with participation from Elevation Capital, Think Investments, and Tiger Global. The Series G round was led by Fidelity Management & Research Company LLC (FMR) and Accel Leaders Fund. Both fundraising rounds were structured as a combination of primary and secondary transactions.Argus Partners
